remedies: Drink fluids often; rest; use light clothing; use a lukewarm sponge bath if uncomfortable; monitor temperature.
Sip warm fluids; try honey if age is over 1 year; use steam inhalation carefully; avoid smoke and dust.
Use oral rehydration solution after each loose stool; eat soft foods; avoid alcohol and very oily food; watch urine output.

symptom_keywords: skin rash|itching of skin|skin irritation|skin dryness|abnormal appearing skin
remedies: Keep the area clean and dry; avoid scratching; use cool compresses; avoid new soaps or irritants.
Rest the painful area; use warm or cold compresses; drink water; avoid heavy exertion until improving.
Drink water; do not hold urine; avoid irritants like alcohol; seek care if fever, back pain, pregnancy, or blood in urine occurs.

symptom_keywords: eye redness|itchiness of eye|lacrimation|eye burns or stings
remedies: Rinse with clean water; avoid rubbing; remove contact lenses; seek urgent care for pain, vision change, or injury.
